prediction.reasoning: Based on typical equity volatility patterns and an 18-day forecast horizon, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model assuming annual volatility of ~25% for a healthcare/technology stock like ELV. The point estimate reflects modest upward drift typical of equity markets, while confidence intervals widen with lower confidence levels to account for increasing uncertainty over the 18-day period. The intervals are symmetric around the drift-adjusted price to reflect the log-normal distribution of stock prices.
